equivalence_argument: No complete mapping was found: the port gates submission through SpcVerifier, but SPC-verified precompiles use local direct signature verification instead of always POSTing every known async result to the configured verification service.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing unconditional external verification-service POST for every known async result before pool update.
related_but_insufficient_code: ritual_async_rpc::submit_async_result builds an SpcVerificationRequest and calls context.spc_verifier.verify_single before pool submission.
SpcVerifier::verify_single routes SPC block-verified precompiles to direct signature verification using the local executor registry.
VerificationClient::send_verification_request does POST to the configured sidecar, but it is used only for precompiles not in the SPC block-verified allowlist.

notes: Confirmed gap relative to the exact external-service invariant.
rationale: The new `verify_result` method builds a `VerificationRequest`, posts it as JSON with reqwest, treats non-success HTTP statuses as errors, decodes `VerificationResponse`, and the handler returns failed `AwaitingExecution` responses for both `Ok(false)` and errors before the pool update block. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: For known async transactions, `ritual_submitAsyncResult` must POST the precompile input, output, proof, block number, transaction hash, and executor to the configured verification service, and it must not update the transaction pool unless the service returns a successful HTTP response whose decoded result is true.
suggested_falsification_tests: Run the handler against a local mock verification service: have it return `result: false` and then a non-2xx status, and in both cases assert the RPC response is unsuccessful with `new_state == "AwaitingExecution"` and the mock pool records no `submit_async_result` call; then assert the JSON request body contains all verification fields from the RPC request plus the pool precompile input.
summary: External POST verification is not universal in the current port.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Submit a result for an SPC block-verified precompile and assert no VerificationClient POST occurs; the current verifier can accept via local signature verification instead.
title: Async results require external verification
